summary: The session focused on strategies for employers to tailor their communication to meet the diverse needs of their employees. The user expressed interest in implementing suggestions for improving workplace communication and maintaining engagement over time.
facts: The user is looking to improve their workplace communication strategy. The user plans to implement tips for recognizing and rewarding good communication in their workplace. The user is interested in maintaining momentum in communication to prevent it from becoming stagnant. The user appreciates suggestions for creating a culture of open communication and providing regular feedback to employees. The user is excited to see changes in workplace communication as they implement these strategies.
